payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial close-up (approx. 0.6 m) of a dark brown glossy wooden picture frame with beveled molding and a narrow gold braided inner trim; the crop shows the left vertical and bottom horizontal sections only, enclosing a faded seascape print with sailboats; frame exhibits minor wear and a small chip at the bottom inner edge and is edge-cropped in the image.
attributes: small chip/wear at bottom inner edge
